message:
feat(demo): add mouse/keyboard support to Performance HUD screen

- Add click-to-select degradation tier (click tier row or press 1-4)
- Add click-to-toggle stress harness
- Add scroll-to-adjust budget on budget panel (+/- 1.0ms per tick)
- Add scroll-to-cycle sparkline mode (FPS/intervals) on sparkline panel
- Track clickable regions via Cell<Rect> for tier, stress, sparkline, budget areas
- Show [FORCED] indicator when tier is manually set
- Fix collapsible_if clippy warnings in widget_builder.rs
- Add 6 new tests for mouse and keyboard tier interactions

Implements bd-iuvb.17.13.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
